component.name: Gatepath
component.summary: Captive-portal handler that protects your other apps

description.p: Gatepath signs you in to captive Wi-Fi networks (hotels, airports, conference venues) without exposing your other running apps to the captive gateway. Traffic from the sign-in page is isolated to the captive interface; your VPN and DNS configuration remain in effect for everything else on your machine.

ul.li: Loads the sign-in page in a sandboxed WebKit view
Writes a structured audit log of every session

description.p: Initial alpha. Captive-portal detection, sandboxed sign-in WebView, audit log.
